rationale: To achieve a 'grandioso' and 'extremadamente hermosa' admin experience for BarrioYa, we are blending the precision of Vercel/Linear dashboards with the vibrant energy of the brand's Colombian roots. Deep obsidian backgrounds paired with BarrioYa Green (#00C853) create high-contrast, data-rich clarity. We avoid messy layouts and instead use strict, dense CSS grids, 1px borders, and micro-interactions.

layout_grid.container: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; padding: 2rem;

rows.name: Welcome Banner
rows.description: Full-width intro banner spanning across the top, showing Admin Name and dynamic greeting.

rows.name: Main Charts & Podium
rows.span: Main Chart (Orders/Day): col-span-12 lg:col-span-8 | Podium (Top Products): col-span-12 lg:col-span-4
rows.description: Primary visual area. Main chart stretches left, Top 3 podium on the right.

rows.name: Secondary Metrics
rows.span: Heatmap/Bar (Orders/Hour): col-span-12 lg:col-span-8 | Donut (Status): col-span-12 lg:col-span-4

surface_cards.css_rules: background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; transition: transform 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
surface_cards.hover_state: transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);

kpi_metrics.structure: Label (uppercase, tracked out) -> Value (large, bold) -> Trend (small, green/red text with arrow).
kpi_metrics.interaction: On hover, a subtle radial gradient glow of var(--primary_glow) appears at the top border.

top_products_podium.structure: 3 columns. Middle is #1 (tallest), Left is #2, Right is #3. Flexbox align-items flex-end.
top_products_podium.visuals: Rank #1 should have a subtle gold/green border highlight. Include product image (avatar circle), name, and order count. Background uses surface_elevated.

welcome_banner.structure: Flex row. Left side: Text greeting (Good Morning, Admin) + subtext. Right side: Date/Time or small contextual graphic.
welcome_banner.visuals: Can use a very subtle dark green gradient background `linear-gradient(135deg, #070707 0%, #0a1f11 100%)`.

page_load.description: Staggered fade-in up for all grid items.
page_load.css: @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

number_counter.description: Vanilla JS function to count up numbers in KPI cards from 0 to target value over 1.5 seconds on load.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use vanilla HTML, CSS, and JS (No React, No Tailwind unless specifically configured).
Append CSS styles to the existing `admin.css` safely or include them in a <style> block specific to the dashboard grid.
Do NOT use inline styles. Use CSS classes based on the design system provided (e.g., `.card`, `.kpi-value`).
Initialize Chart.js directly in a <script> tag. Ensure the canvas elements have the correct `data-testid` attributes.
Implement the 'number counter' animation in JS when the page loads.
Use the exact font families and CSS variables defined in this document to override/extend the dark mode.
Implement a CSS Grid layout for the main content area matching the 12-column setup described.
Ensure the Top 3 Podium is built using flexbox to visually rank items with heights corresponding to their rank (1 is tallest in center).
